welcome:
🧬 *ONIX Solana Scanner*

Real-time arbitrage scanner between BingX Futures and Jupiter DEX.

• Track spreads in real time
• Get Telegram alerts
• Manage your watchlist
reset_code_hint: If you lose access to your authenticator AND backup codes, use this to reset 2FA.
enter_otp:
Enter your 2FA code to log in.

Type the code or send *cancel* to abort.
enter_otp_for_link:
Enter your 2FA code to get a login link.

Type the code or send *cancel* to abort.
code_expired: Code expired. Request a new one.
too_many_attempts: Too many failed attempts. Try again in 5 minutes.
invalid_code:
Invalid code. {remaining} attempt(s) remaining.

Type *cancel* to abort.
2fa_reset:
✅ 2FA has been reset. You can now log in without a code.

Set up a new authenticator in Settings to enable 2FA again.
registration_required:
You need to set up two-factor authentication first.

Tap *Register* to begin.
setup_intro:
To protect your account from unauthorized access, we require two-factor authentication.

Add this account to your authenticator app and enter the 6-digit code to confirm.

Popular authenticator apps:
qr_caption:
Scan this QR code in your authenticator app, then send me the 6-digit code.

Or enter this secret manually: `{secret}`
app_qr_caption:
*{name}*

Scan the QR code with your phone, or open the link below:
